activities_projects.title: Think of a Number Trick
steps: Think of any number
Double the number
Add 4
Divide the result by 2
Subtract the original number
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how algebra explains number tricks
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation using variable x (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Create Your Own Number Trick
steps: Choose a starting number
Create a sequence of operations
Use algebra to prove the final answer is constant

activities_projects.title: Date Prediction Game
steps: Think of a date (month and day)
Follow the arithmetic steps given in the activity
Use algebra to find the original date from the final answer

activities_projects.title: Number Pyramid Builder
steps: Draw a pyramid with three rows
Write numbers in the bottom row
Add adjacent numbers to fill the next row
Continue until the top is filled

activities_projects.title: Missing Number Pyramid
steps: Draw a pyramid with missing values
Assign variables to unknown numbers
Use equations to find missing values
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct calculation of missing numbers (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Calendar Magic
steps: Select any 2×2 grid in a calendar
Add the four numbers
Use algebra to find the numbers from the sum
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct deduction of grid numbers (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Algebra Grid Puzzle
steps: Draw a grid with symbols instead of numbers
Use the rule that row totals equal the sum of values
Assign variables and solve equations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves logical reasoning and algebra skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct solution of grid puzzle (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Largest Product Game
activities_projects.objective: Understand number arrangement for maximum product
steps: Take three digits (e.g., 2, 3, 5)
Arrange them to form multiplication expressions
Calculate all possible products
Identify the largest product
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops strategic thinking in number arrangement
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of largest product (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Divisibility Trick Investigation
steps: Choose a two-digit number
Reverse the digits
Find the difference between the numbers
Divide the result by 9
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands why the result is divisible by 9

activities_projects.title: Real Life Algebra Problems
steps: Solve word problems like animals and legs or age puzzles
Translate the problem into equations
Solve the equations step by step
